title: Proclamation No. 1836, s. 1979
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 1836

RESERVING FOR MARKET SITE PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LINGAYEN, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon recommendation of the Minister of Natural Resources, and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for market site purposes under the administration of the Sangguniang Bayan of Lingayen, Pangasinan, subject to private rights, if any there be, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in the Municipality of Lingayen, Province of Pangasinan, Island of Luzon, and more particularly described as follows:

Plan-Mr. 1-00001

A PARCEL OF LAND (Plan-Mr-1-00001) situated at Poblacion, Municipality of Lingayen, Province of Pangasinan. Bounded on the North along line 1-2 by Lot 1256, Cad-373-D, along line 2-3 by Lot 1257, Cad-373-D; along line 3-4 by Lot 1258, Cad-373-D (Psu-170872); along line 4-5 by Lot 1259, Cad-373-D (Lot 2, Psu-171630); along line 5-6 by Lot 1260, Cad-373-D; along line 6-7 by Lot 1261, Cad-373-D (Lot 1, Psu-171630); along line 7-8 by Lot 1262, Cad-373-D; along line 8-9 by Lot 1263, Cad-373-D; along line 10-11 by Lot 1266, Cad-373-D (Lot 1, Psu-227581); along line 11-12 by Lot 14686, Cad-373-D; along line 12-13 by Lot 1267, Cad-373-D; along line 13-14 by Lot 1275, Cad-373-D; along line 14-15 by Road; along lines 15-16-17-18-19-20 by Lot 1289, Cad-373-D; along lines 20-21-22 by Lot 1288, Cad-373-D; on the North East along lines 22-23-24-25-26-27-28-29 by Lot 1276, Cad-373-D; (Psu-231945); on the East along line 29-30 by Lot 1277, Cad-373-D; along lines 30-31-32 by Lot 1278, Cad-373-D (Psu-191331) (Portion); along line 32-33 by Lot 1279, Cad-373-D; along lines 33-34-35 by Lot 1285, Cad-373-D; along lines 35-36-37-38 by Lot 1280, Cad-373-D; along line 38-39 by Lot 1281; Cad-373-D (Psu-95400) (Portion) along lines 39-40-41 by Lot 1282, Cad-373-D (Psu-131334) (Portion); on the South East and South, along lines 41-42-43-44-45-46-47 by Lot 1283, Cad-373-D; on the South West along lines 47-48-49-50 by Agno River; and the North West along line 50-51 by Lot 1489, Cad-373-D; and along line 51-1 by Road.

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Plan Mr-1-00001, being S. 74-08 W., 347.96 m. from BLLM No. 1, Cad-373-D; thence

point of beginning. Containing an area of SIXTY FIVE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED AND THIRTY EIGHT (65,438) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: Points 48 and 49 by Stakes, and the rest by Old Pls. Cyl. Conc. Mons. Bearings true. This survey was executed in accordance with the law and existing regulations promulgated thereunder, by Laurentino P. Baltazar, Geodetic Engineer of August 19, 1976, and approved on October 2, 1978.

This lot 60176, an additional lot of Cad-373-D.

This proclamation is subject to the following conditions, to wit:

1. That the Jose (Basina) River shall have a minimum bank to bank width of 150 meters at the reclamation site and its waterway area should not be less than that of the existing river channel immediately downstream of the area to be reclaimed;

2. That a strip of ten (10) meters of the land shall be left open to serve as an access road and working space for maintenance and/or improvement of the river channel;

3. That no structure shall be constructed on the river channel beyond the reclamation area; and

4. That a master plan for the proposed drainage and disposal to the river of the storm run-off flow coming from the surrounding inland drainage areas and from the reclamation area itself should be submitted to the Bureau of Public Works for approval. No reclamation work should be started until said master plan is approved by the Bureau of Public Works.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 28th day of March, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy-nine.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(Sgd.) JUAN C. TUVERA Presidential Executive Assistant

Source: CDAsia
